name: A guided hike in the Dolomites
summary: Experience the excitement among the wonders of the Brenta Dolomites! Unforgettable excursions, breathtaking views, adventure in a paradise.
accomodiation: Cozy mountain huts along the Brenta Dolomites with stunning panoramic views.
